results.title: The Pirates of Penzance
results.creator_credit: Wilford Leach, Joseph Papp and Universal Pictures
results.brief_description: Frederic (Rex Smith) has been apprenticed to a pirate crew by mistake and when his term finishes he attempts to bring them to justice. Presenting a film adaptation of the classic Gilbert and Sullivan opera with music orchestrated, arranged and conducted by William Elliott, choreography by Graciela Daniele and cast including Kevin Kline (Pirate King), Angela lansbury (Ruth), Linda Ronstadt (Mabel) and George Rose (Major-General).

results.title: The Pirate's gold
results.creator_credit: D.W. Griffith and American Mutoscope and Biograph Company
results.brief_description: A dying pirate hides treasure in an old woman’s cottage. Many years later, when her son is in great need, it comes to light. Cast includes Florence Lawrence, Arthur V. Johnson, Tony O’Sullivan, mack Sennett. Silent film with no intertitles.

results.title: The Pipes of Para
results.brief_description: The life of the German settlers in the Barossa Valley of the Adelaide Hills. Tells of an organist’s return to the Barossa Valley after forty years. He goes to the Valley to play for a wedding and as he recognises landmarks en route he recalls the times when, as a young man, he played in the Valley churches on organs designed and built by Lutherans living there. Features Pym Walker.

results.title: The Pioneers
results.creator_credit: Tim Burstall, Patrick Ryan and Eltham Films
results.brief_description: Frederick McCubbin’s melancholy paintings of the hardships of life in the bush in the early days. The ballad accompaniment written by Tim Burstall, music by Carl Ogden, and sung by Glen Tomasetti and Paul Marks.

results.title: The Pioneer Burro
results.creator_credit: Thomas Stanton, Pat Dowling and Pat Dowling Pictures
results.brief_description: Describes the role of the burro and the prospector during the California gold rush and development of the West. The burro was not only the prospector’s companion but also carried supplies and equipment, found water in the desert and foraged for his own food. Shows methods of finding and recovering gold by means of pan and cradle.

results.title: The Pink Floyd and Syd Barrett story
results.creator_credit: John Edington, BBC-TV and Otmoor Productions
results.brief_description: Moving documentary about 1960s rock musician Syd Barrett, composer and vocalist in the original line up of the band Pink Floyd. Featuring contemporary interviews with band members and some original footage from the swinging 1960s, this documentary portrays the downfall of a life full of potential - ruined by psychodelic drugs and mental health problems. Syd’s departure from the band in 1968 and his personal problems are not the only things that still resonate with band members and friends - his musical contribution and influence also live on. Contains interviews with friends and fans and features some classic early Pink Floyd songs. Narrated by Kirsty Wark. Other band members featured are David Gilmour, Roger Waters, Nick Mason and Rick Wright.

results.title: The Pig's wedding
results.creator_credit: Gene Deitch, Kratky Film and Weston Woods Studios
results.brief_description: Smoke signals herald the impending marriage of pigs Porker and Curly Tail. The guests are busy cleaning, preening and painting on the perfect outfits, then it’s time for some serious eating, drinking and dancing, until rain threatens the celebrations.

results.title: The Pied piper of Hamelin: Cinderella
results.creator_credit: Mark Hall, Brian Cosgrove and Cosgrove-Hall Productions
results.brief_description: This tape includes two wonderful fairy tales featuring puppets from Cosgrove Hall studios. “The Pied piper of Hamelin”; set in the fourteenth century this story centres around the greedy councillors who reneg on a promise to pay the piper for ridding the township of rats. They pay dearly for their broken promise. Narrated by Robert Hardy with music composed by David Rohl and Stuart J. Wolstenholme. The presentation of “Cinderella” is based on the one by Perrault, with the unusual feature of being told through the music which was specially composed for the film. A spectacular blend of puppetry, animation, music and colour. Music is once again composed by David Rohl and Stuart J Wolstenholme.
